panels.title: Sampled request waterfall by trace id

targets.rawSql: SELECT trace_id, operation, component, status, AVG(duration_micros) AS avg_micros, SUM(fsync_count) AS fsyncs, SUM(bytes_in) AS bytes_in, SUM(bytes_out) AS bytes_out FROM anvil_trace_event GROUP BY trace_id, operation, component, status ORDER BY avg_micros DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: RocksDB WriteBatch duration and fsync duration

targets.rawSql: SELECT column_family_group, status, COUNT(*) AS batches, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_rocksdb_write_batch_duration_ms GROUP BY column_family_group, status ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT operation, content_class, status, SUM(count) AS bytes, COUNT(*) AS samples, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_landed_bytes_duration_ms LEFT JOIN anvil_landed_bytes_total USING (operation, content_class, status) GROUP BY operation, content_class, status ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Final shard write duration and shard fsync duration

targets.rawSql: SELECT node_id, region_id, cell_id, operation, status, COUNT(*) AS writes, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_block_write_duration_ms GROUP BY node_id, region_id, cell_id, operation, status ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: File fsync by component and class

targets.rawSql: SELECT component, file_class, operation, COUNT(*) AS fsyncs, AVG(duration_ms) AS avg_ms, MAX(duration_ms) AS max_ms FROM anvil_fsync_duration_ms GROUP BY component, file_class, operation ORDER BY max_ms DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT operation, status, COUNT(*) AS samples, AVG(duration_micros) AS avg_micros, MAX(duration_micros) AS max_micros FROM anvil_trace_event WHERE operation='manifest.publish' GROUP BY operation, status ORDER BY max_micros DESC LIMIT 20
